content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 1Password: Senior Web Developer Anywhere in the World Analytics, CMS Development, Cross-Browser Development, AI Content Creation, Content Writing, Accounting, Content Creation, Content Strategy, Analytics Tools, and Content Planning Back-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5584/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote (United States | Canada) <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://1password.com">http://1password.com</a> </p> <p><em><strong>1Password is growing.</strong> We’ve surpassed $400M in ARR and we’re continuing to accelerate, earning a spot on the Forbes Cloud 100 for four years in a row and teaming up with iconic partners like Oracle Red Bull Racing.</em></p><p></p><p><strong>About 1Password</strong></p><p><em>At 1Password, we’re building the foundation for a safe, productive digital future. Our mission is to unleash employee productivity without compromising security by ensuring every identity is authentic, every application sign-in is secure, and every device is trusted. We innovated the market-leading enterprise password manager and pioneered Unified Access Management, a new cybersecurity category built for the way people and AI agents work today. As one of the most loved brands in cybersecurity, we take a human-centric approach in everything from product strategy to user experience. Over 180,000 businesses, from Fortune 100 leaders to the world’s most innovative AI companies, trust 1Password to help their teams securely adopt the SaaS and AI tools they need to do their best work.</em></p><p></p><p><em>If you're excited about the opportunity to contribute to the digital safety of millions, to work alongside a team of curious, driven individuals, and to solve hard problems in a fast-paced, dynamic environment, then we want to hear from you. Come join us and help shape a safer, simpler digital future.</em></p><p></p><p>The Web Engineering team builds and maintains 1Password's main Marketing website (<a href="http://1password.com">1password.com</a>) to help showcase campaigns, new features, and the incredible work being done here at 1Password. We're at a pivotal point in our journey with the website and are looking for an experienced <strong>Senior Web Developer</strong> to bring their expertise, drive, and passion to help us continue to grow and evolve the platform. You will work with Product, Design, Content, SEO, Digital Web Experience, and other Marketing and Engineering teams to deliver the next generation of our web presence.</p><p><strong>How we’re using AI today</strong></p><p>On the Marketing team, we’re growing our AI capability together and redesigning how work gets done. We’ve built agents to improve workflows focused on competitive intelligence, content creation, and campaign planning, helping us stay sharp, reduce context-switching, and surface the right information at the right time. AI helps us coordinate, execute, and uncover insights faster so we can spend more time on what’s most important: performance, judgement, and driving the future of 1Password.</p><p></p><p>This is a remote opportunity within Canada and the US.</p><p></p><p><strong>What we're looking for:</strong></p><ul><li><p>4+ years of experience designing and building complex, production-grade client-side web applications, from initial planning through to deployment</p></li><li><p>Advanced production experience with TypeScript, React, Next.js, CSS frameworks and component libraries</p></li><li><p>Experience working with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), automations, and AI-assisted development tools</p></li><li><p>Experience contributing to the evolution and scalability of web platforms, including large-scale migrations, web performance optimization, technical SEO, headless CMS, and frontend architecture</p></li><li><p>The ability to set the technical vision for a project, contribute to the team's roadmap, and proactively make sound, independent technical decisions even in ambiguous or fast-moving environments</p></li><li><p>Experience being a technical partner in planning, executing, and shipping features in close collaboration with cross-functional teams and stakeholders</p></li><li><p>Experience shipping quality software quickly, focusing on customer value and iteration</p></li><li><p>Ability to offer constructive feedback through code reviews and a genuine interest in mentoring junior and intermediate developers</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>Bonus points for:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Experience with Contentful CMS</p></li><li><p>Experience with Marketing Technologies and integrations, journeys and metrics (Marketo, Chatbots, B2B, B2C, Bounce Rates, Pageviews, etc.)</p></li></ul><p></p><p><strong>What you can expect:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Partnering with cross-functional teams to help prioritize work that balances product requirements, customer value, and technical needs</p></li><li><p>Leading the technical design and implementation of features, platform improvements, and large-scale migrations across the Marketing website</p></li><li><p>Owning end-to-end delivery of medium-to-large projects, from scoping and planning through to production</p></li><li><p>Making informed technical decisions within your projects and documenting solutions and architectural designs</p></li><li><p>Writing code with a focus on reliability, quality, and durability</p></li><li><p>Contributing to a team culture of shared ownership, continuous improvement, and constructive feedback</p></li><li><p>Helping others level up their skills through mentoring, coaching, and code review</p></li><li><p>Proactively seeking opportunities to expand your technical knowledge and grow your leadership skills</p></li></ul><p></p><p>USA-based roles only: The annual base salary for this role is between $153,000 USD and $214,000 USD, plus immediate participation in 1Password's benefits program (health, dental, 401k and many others), utilization of our generous paid time off, an equity grant and, where applicable, participation in our incentive programs.</p><p></p><p>Canada-based roles only: The annual base salary for this role is between $144,000 CAD and $202,000 CAD, plus immediate participation in 1Password’s generous benefits program (health, dental, RRSP and many others), utilization of our generous paid time off, an equity grant and, where applicable, participation in our incentive programs.<br><br>At 1Password, we approach each individual's compensation with a promise of fair market value and internal equity commensurate with experience and specific skill set.<br><br><em>This posting is for an existing vacancy.</em></p><p></p><p><br><strong>Our culture </strong><br>At 1Password, we p
